title: 32 Mini Christmas Cards for Kids – 4 Cute Designs – Small Xmas Cards with Envelopes – School Christmas Cards for Boys & Girls – Santa, Snowman, Penguin & Elf – 8.5 x 6 cm
features: 🎄 32 Mini Christmas Cards for Kids – Ideal for school exchanges, each festive pack includes 32 mini cards with envelopes, perfect for boys and girls to spread holiday cheer.
🎅 4 Cute Designs – Includes snowman, Santa, penguin, and elf designs that children will love handing out to classmates, teachers, and friends.
💌 Message Inside – Each card has a pre-printed Merry Christmas message, making them quick and easy for kids to use.
📏 Mini Size: 8.5 x 6 cm – Great for schoolbags and pockets
🟥 Red Envelopes Included – Each card comes with a bright red envelope for a bold, seasonal touch and easy posting.
description: 🎄 Spread Joy with 32 Mini Christmas Cards for Kids! Make school exchanges and festive greetings extra special with this cheerful pack of 32 mini Christmas cards. With adorable characters and a sweet seasonal message inside, they’re perfect for boys and girls to share the holiday spirit! 🎅 4 Fun Festive Designs Delight children with a mix of 4 playful illustrations: ☃️ Smiling Snowman 🎅 Classic Santa Claus 🐧 Cheeky Penguin 🧝‍♂️ Jolly Elf 💌 Perfect for School Exchanges Sized just right for classroom card swaps, each card fits perfectly in tiny hands and comes with a vibrant red envelope – ready to send. 🖊️ Message Inside: Merry Christmas Each card includes a printed festive greeting inside, helping save time while still adding a heartfelt touch. 📏 Mini Size – Big Impact Measuring 8.5 x 6 cm, these mini cards are perfect for schoolbags, stockings, party bags, or advent calendars. 🎁 What’s Included: ✔️ 32 mini Christmas cards (4 assorted designs) ✔️ 32 red envelopes ✔️ Printed message: Merry Christmas inside every card
